text:
Code (Fourth Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 
DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the fourth of up to 10 waiver type codes. There are separate variables for each of 
the 12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 
SHORT NAME: 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_01 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_02 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_03 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_04 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_05 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_06 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_07 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_08 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_09 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_10 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_11 
WVR_TYPE_CD_04_12
